user.title: Mei Eden Login
user.description: Enter your phone number (10 digits, starts with 05). We'll send an OTP via SMS.

verify.title: SMS Verification
verify.description: Enter the code sent via SMS to {phone}

reauth_confirm.title: Session expired
reauth_confirm.description: Session for account {phone} expired. A new SMS will be sent for re-authentication.

error.invalid_phone_format: Invalid phone format - must be 10 digits starting with 05
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach Mei Eden - check internet connection
